IJ Su r ely , We have revealed to y o u the Book in tru t h that y o u may ju d ge between the people by that which Allaah has shown y o u , so do not be a pleader for the treacherou s . And seek the forgiveness of Allaah, certainly, Allaah is ever Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful.61

An increase in seeking forgiveness necessitates the wiping away of the repercussions ofsins, which is one ofthe causes offorgetting knowledge and becoming ignorant, as Allaah says,

46 .I cu r sed them and made their hearts grow hard. They change the words from their proper places and forgot a good part of the message that was sent to them.62

Imaam ash-Shaafi'ee once said: I complained to Wakee '63 about my poor memory So he advised me to abandon disobedience. and he said, 'know that knowledge is light. And the light ofAllaah is not bestowed upon a disobedient.

So it is certainly possible that seeking forgiveness causes Allaah to give a person enlightenment.

I ask Allaah to grant me success, make me upright, that He keeps us firm with the Firm Word (Shahaadah) in this lifeand the Hereafter; and that He does not cause ou r hearts to deviate afterhaving guided us and to grant us from His self, mercy; Indeed,He is the Benevolent.

All praise is for Allaah alone, and may He praise, send peace and blessings u p on ou r Prophet Mu h ammad and his Companions.

63 Wak.ee ·Ibn al-Jarraahwas a famous scholar from the Salafand one ofthe teachers oflmaam ash-Shaafi'ee. He diedin the y e ar 196H.
content_id:
"Sesungguhnya Kami telah menurunkan Kitab kepadamu dengan membawa kebenaran, supaya kamu mengadili antara manusia dengan apa yang telah Allah wahyukan kepadamu." (QS 4:105)

Kesimpulan dari kajian tentang perbedaan pendapat para ulama: Al-Quran dan Sunnah adalah standar tertinggi yang harus menjadi rujukan dalam setiap perbedaan. Seorang Muslim yang baik tidak memilih pendapat berdasarkan hawa nafsu atau kemudahan semata, melainkan berdasarkan dalil dan ilmu.

Menghormati para imam mazhab tidak berarti menutup mata dari dalil yang lebih kuat. Imam Malik berkata: "Setiap orang dapat diambil dan dapat ditolak ucapannya, kecuali penghuni kubur ini" — sambil menunjuk makam Nabi ﷺ. Imam Ahmad berkata: "Jangan taqlid kepadaku, jangan taqlid kepada Malik, jangan kepada al-Syafi'i, jangan kepada al-Tsauri — ambillah dari mana mereka mengambil."

Ini adalah warisan metodologis yang mulia: kembali kepada dalil, menghormati para ulama, dan menjaga persatuan umat di atas kebenaran.

IJ Su r ely , We have revealed to y o u the الكتاب in tru t h that y o u may ju d ge between the people by that which Allaah has shown y o u , لذا do not be a pleader for the treacherou s . And seek the المغفرة of Allaah, certainly, Allaah is ever Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful.61 An increase in seeking المغفرة necessitates the wiping away of the repercussions ofsins, which is one ofthe causes offorgetting العلم and becoming ignorant, as Allaah says, 46 .I cu r sed them and made their القلوب grow hard. They change the words from their proper places and forgot a الخير part of the message that was sent to them.62 Imaam ash-Shaafi'ee حين said: I complained to Wakee '63 about my poor memory لذا he advised me to abandon disobedience. and قال, 'know that العلم is light. And the light ofAllaah is not bestowed upon a disobedient. لذا it is certainly possible that seeking المغفرة causes Allaah to give a person enlightenment. I ask Allaah to grant me الفلاح, make me upright, that He keeps us firm with the Firm Word (Shahaadah) in this lifeand الآخرة; and that He does not cause ou r القلوب to deviate afterhaving guided us and to grant us from His self, الرحمة; Indeed,He is the Benevolent. All praise is for Allaah alone, and may He praise, send peace and البركات u p on ou r النبي Mu h ammad and his الصحابة. 63 Wak.ee ·Ibn al-Jarraahwas a famous scholar from the Salafand one ofthe teachers oflmaam ash-Shaafi'ee. He diedin the y e ar 196H.
